title: Conditional sentences for advice
subtitle: If I were you, I would...
overview: Use si yo fuera tú as a chunk.
This is useful advice language at B1.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: If I were you, I would rest.
I would speak with the boss.
It would be better to wait.

items.es: Si yo fuera tú, llamaría al médico.
items.en: If I were you, I would call the doctor.

items.es: Yo no compraría ese billete sin revisar la fecha.
items.en: I would not buy that ticket without checking the date.

items.es: Sería mejor hablar con Ana primero.
items.en: It would be better to speak with Ana first.

items.es: Podrías explicar el problema con calma.
items.en: You could explain the problem calmly.

items.es: En tu lugar, pediría otra opinión.
items.en: In your place, I would ask for another opinion.
